sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n99010" key="sunaggi/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">συναγγία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n99010.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">confined space</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0614.tlg001:27:2" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Babr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">27.2</biblScope></bibl>, but <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">f.l. for</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">συναγκίῃ</ref></xr>.</sense> </entryFree>
